synthesis_message:
# Merged Idea: Combined Brainstorming

This idea combines two brainstorming sessions that independently addressed related topics.

## From Idea A
- Focus on automated workflow optimization
- Core problem: manual processes slow down delivery
- Goal: streamline operations with automation

## From Idea B
- Focus on data-driven decision making
- Core problem: lack of real-time insights
- Goal: dashboard for operational metrics

## Overlapping Areas
- Both address operational efficiency improvements
- Both target reducing manual effort in daily workflows

## Next Steps
- Define the combined end-to-end workflow
- Identify integration points between automation and analytics

board_instructions.description: Combined workflow automation topic from both ideas
Analytics dashboard topic from Idea B
